metadata.title: Disney <-> OpenAI / Sora: funding edge (rescinded) + IP-liability overhang
metadata.provenance: Web-verified directly (Variety, CNBC, Axios, TechCrunch, WDWNT). Two distinct relationship types: (a) a brief equity+licensing edge that was ANNOUNCED then CANCELLED, and (b) an adversarial IP-litigation cluster. Models content-provenance/legal risk and deal fragility, NOT circular funding.
metadata.why_it_matters: This is a complete bubble MICRO-CYCLE: a $1B mega-deal formed (Dec 11 2025) and collapsed (Mar 24 2026) inside ~90 days, with the underlying product (Sora app) shut down. It is the cleanest real-world instance of an edge in the funding graph reversing - exactly the dynamic the TLA+ cascade model formalizes.

entities.name: Disney
entities.notes: Ticker $DIS. Simultaneously (a) a would-be OpenAI investor/licensor and (b) lead litigant against AI image/video generators. Pulled its OpenAI investment.

edges.notes: Disney announced a $1B equity stake in OpenAI on Dec 11 2025. NEVER CLOSED/FUNDED - dropped when OpenAI shut down Sora on Mar 24 2026. A booked-then-vaporized commitment: a worked example of how much of the $1.4T 'commitment' stack is reversible announcement, not cash.
3-year content license letting Sora/ChatGPT Images generate 200+ characters from Disney/Marvel/Pixar/Star Wars; Disney+ to curate Sora videos later in 2026. Cancelled with the Sora shutdown.
Copyright-infringement suit (joined later vs Minimax). The studio cartel litigating the generative-AI cluster = a systemic, uncapped contingent liability sitting on top of AI valuations.
C&D alleging copyright infringement on a 'massive scale' (training + distribution). Parallel C&Ds to Meta, Character.AI; Feb 2026 C&D to ByteDance Seedance 2.0.

events.event: Sora 2 launches with an OPT-OUT model (rightsholders must flag exclusion); floods with Disney/Marvel/Star Wars/Nintendo IP; Hollywood backlash.
OpenAI announces it is SHUTTING DOWN the Sora video app ('We're saying goodbye to Sora', no reason given); Disney drops the $1B investment.
